title: nepeta glomerulosa subsp. stapfiana
intro: Nepeta glomerulosa subsp. stapfiana is a subspecies of the Nepeta glomerulosa plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the Balkan Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nepeta glomerulosa subsp. stapfiana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a valuable natural remedy. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
